threadName: Marketplace MVP technical specifications and artifacts

messages.content: buatkan aplikasi yang sudah lengkap semua fitur untuk jualan seperti shopee

Rekomendasi singkat: kita mulai dengan MVP (Minimum Viable Product) marketplace multi‑seller yang mencakup fitur inti (daftar produk, keranjang & checkout, manajemen toko penjual, order, pembayaran, tracking, review, admin dashboard). Setelah Anda setuju saya akan buatkan spesifikasi teknis lengkap + scaffolding kode (repo awal) atau desain UI, sesuai pilihan platform (web / mobile / keduanya).

Berikut rencana, fitur, arsitektur, dan opsi implementasi yang saya siapkan untuk Anda — baca lalu jawab 3 pertanyaan di bagian akhir supaya saya bisa langsung mulai buatkan repo/kerangka kerja.

1) Tujuan & ruang lingkup MVP
- Tujuan: marketplace seperti Shopee pada level fitur inti untuk transaksional end‑to‑end.
- Fokus MVP (prioritas tinggi):
  - Autentikasi (user, seller, admin) + otorisasi per role
  - Registrasi toko penjual, manajemen produk (CRUD, foto, stok)
  - Katalog & pencarian dasar (kategori, filter, sorting)
  - Halaman produk, variasi, harga
  - Keranjang belanja & checkout
  - Integrasi pembayaran (gateway lokal/Stripe/Xendit/Midtrans)
  - Pembuatan order, manajemen status order (pending → paid → packing → shipped → delivered → completed)
  - Notifikasi (email + push sederhana)
  - Dashboard seller (order, produk, saldo)
  - Dashboard admin (user management, order oversight, payout)
  - Review dan rating produk
  - Pengelolaan ongkos kirim manual (MVP) + tracking nomor resi
  - Basic security, logging, backup

2) Fitur lanjutan (versi setelah MVP)
- Promo / kupon / flash sale / campaign
- Integrasi kurir real‑time (API J&T, SiCepat, Pos Indonesia, dll)
- Rekomendasi produk / personalization (ML)
- Live commerce / livestream selling
- Chat buyer‑seller (real time)
- Wallet/internal balance, top up & payout otomatis
- Seller verification, dispute handling, returns/refunds, invoice
- Analytics & BI, fraud detection, rate limiting
- Multi‑warehouse / inventory sync
- Mobile apps native/performance optimizations

3) Arsitektur teknis yang saya rekomendasikan
- Frontend Web: Next.js + React (TypeScript) — SSR/SSG untuk SEO halaman produk
- Mobile: React Native atau Flutter (jika ingin satu codebase mobile)
- Backend: Node.js + TypeScript (NestJS atau Express) atau alternativ Go
- Database: PostgreSQL (relasional untuk order/produk), Redis (cache, session)
- Search: Meilisearch atau Elasticsearch untuk pencarian produk
- File storage: S3 (AWS/GCS/MinIO)
- Queue/background jobs: BullMQ + Redis atau RabbitMQ (email, notifikasi, payouts)
- Payments: integrasi gateway lokal (Midtrans/Xendit) atau Stripe
- CI/CD: GitHub Actions → deploy ke AWS/GCP/Render/DigitalOcean
- Observability: Sentry (error), Prometheus + Grafana (metrics), structured logs
- Infrastruktur: IaC dengan Terraform / Pulumi (opsional)

4) Data model kunci (ringkas)
- users(id, name, email, phone, role, password_hash, created_at)
- shops(id, owner_user_id, name, status, created_at)
- products(id, shop_id, title, description, category_id, price, currency, is_active)
- product_variants(id, product_id, sku, price, stock)
- orders(id, buyer_id, shop_id, total_amount, status, payment_id, shipping_address_id, created_at)
- order_items(id, order_id, product_variant_id, qty, unit_price)
- payments(id, order_id, provider, status, provider_ref)
- shipments(id, order_id, courier, tracking_no, status)
- reviews(id, product_id, user_id, rating, comment)

(Saya bisa kirimkan SQL schema lengkap jika Anda mau.)

5) API utama (contoh singkat)
- POST /api/auth/signup, /api/auth/login
- GET /api/products, GET /api/products/:id
- POST /api/shops (seller), GET /api/shops/:id/products
- POST /api/cart, GET /api/cart, POST /api/checkout
- POST /api/payments/webhook (payment status)
- GET /api/orders/:id, PATCH /api/orders/:id/status (seller/admin)
- POST /api/reviews

6) UI/UX dasar (flow)
- Landing → kategori → list produk → halaman produk → add to cart → checkout → bayar → order confirmation
- Seller: dashboard → daftar produk → tambah produk → lihat order → kirim / update resi
- Admin: manage users/shops/orders, view disputes

7) Keamanan & kepatuhan singkat
- Password hashing (bcrypt/argon2), JWT + refresh tokens atau session cookies (secure)
- Rate limiting, input validation, prepared statements / ORM (TypeORM/Prisma)
- PCI: jangan simpan card data; gunakan hosted checkout/gateway
- GDPR/Privacy: opsi penghapusan akun, retention policy (sesuai wilayah)

8) Estimasi waktu & tim (untuk MVP)
- Tim kecil (2 backend, 1 frontend, 1 mobile, 1 QA/DevOps) → 3–4 bulan
- Solo developer (fullstack experienced) → 6–9 bulan
- Biaya bergantung lokasi tim, hosting skala, SLA. Saya bisa buat estimasi lebih akurat setelah Anda sebutkan preferensi.

9) Deliverables yang bisa saya buat untuk Anda sekarang
- Pilihan A: Spesifikasi teknis lengkap + ERD + API docs + wireframes.
- Pilihan B: Scaffold kode (mono‑repo) dengan:
  - Next.js frontend (auth + listing + product page)
  - NestJS backend dengan auth, product endpoints, DB migrations (Prisma)
  - Basic CI config + Dockerfile + README + deploy script
- Pilihan C: Full prototype (web) — implementasi end‑to‑end MVP (butuh persetujuan scope & waktu).

10) Pertanyaan singkat supaya saya bisa mulai
1. Target platform: web only / web + mobile / mobile only?  
2. Preferensi tech stack (React/Next.js + Node, atau mau saya rekomendasikan)?  
3. Integrasi pembayaran & kurir mana yang perlu (mis. Midtrans/Xendit/Stripe; J&T/SiCepat/Sicepat/etc)?  
4. Apakah Anda mau saya langsung buatkan repo GitHub scaffold (sebutkan owner/repo atau saya buat PR template), atau mulai dengan spesifikasi lengkap dulu?

Apa yang sudah saya lakukan: saya menyiapkan rencana MVP, daftar fitur, stack rekomendasi, data model ringkas, API utama, estimasi waktu, dan opsi deliverable. Selanjutnya yang akan saya lakukan setelah Anda jawab pertanyaan di atas adalah: 1) finalisasi scope MVP sesuai preferensi Anda, lalu 2) buatkan spesifikasi teknis lengkap + ERD atau langsung generate scaffolding kode (pilihan Anda).

Mau mulai dari spesifikasi lengkap atau langsung scaffold kode? Sebutkan pilihan + jawaban ke pertanyaan (1–4) di atas, dan saya langsung mulai.

Bagus — saya siap mulai. Tolong pilih satu dari opsi deliverable berikut dan jawab 1–4 singkat supaya saya langsung kerja:

Pilihan deliverable (pilih A, B, atau C)
- A: Spesifikasi teknis lengkap + ERD + API docs + wireframes.
- B: Scaffold kode (mono‑repo) dengan Next.js (frontend) + NestJS (backend) + Prisma, Docker, CI, dan contoh fitur dasar (auth, produk, keranjang, checkout stub).
- C: Prototype web end‑to‑end MVP (butuh konfirmasi scope dan waktu).

Pertanyaan (jawab singkat atau ketik “pakai default”)
1) Target platform: web only / web + mobile / mobile only?
2) Stack preferensi: terima rekomendasi (Next.js + NestJS + Postgres + Prisma) atau mau lain?
3) Pembayaran & kurir: sebutkan gateway (mis. Xendit / Midtrans / Stripe) dan kurir yang diutamakan (mis. J&T, SiCepat, Pos).
4) Repo GitHub: mau saya buatkan scaffold ke repo baru? Jika iya, berikan owner/repo (mis. audrisyahroni180-dot/marketplace-mvp) atau ketik “saya beri akses nanti”.

Contoh jawaban singkat yang mempercepat:
B; web only; pakai rekomendasi; Xendit + J&T; buat ke audrisyahroni180-dot/marketplace-mvp

Setelah Anda jawab, saya akan langsung mulai: jika B/C saya akan buat scaffold awal (commit + README + instruksi run); jika A saya akan kirimkan spesifikasi lengkap + ERD.

Siap — saya sudah membuat Spesifikasi Teknis lengkap untuk MVP marketplace (seperti Shopee) berikut ERD, API docs inti, dan wireframes halaman utama. Di bawah ini ada ringkasan cepat lalu artefak lengkap yang bisa langsung dipakai sebagai basis pengembangan.

Ringkasan singkat
- Scope: MVP marketplace multi‑seller (auth, pendaftaran toko, manajemen produk, katalog & pencarian dasar, keranjang, checkout stub, order lifecycle, seller & admin dashboard, review, notifikasi dasar).
- Stack rekomendasi: Next.js (TypeScript) untuk frontend, NestJS (TypeScript) untuk backend, PostgreSQL, Redis, S3-compatible storage, Meilisearch (optional) untuk search.
- Autentikasi: JWT + refresh token atau session cookie terproteksi (pilih salah satu).
- Pembayaran: webhook‑ready (stub) — integrasikan Xendit/Midtrans/Stripe sesuai pilihan nanti.
- Deliverable selanjutnya saya bisa konversi jadi repo scaffold (kode) jika Anda minta.

Apa yang sudah saya lakukan: saya menyiapkan spesifikasi lengkap (ERD + SQL CREATE TABLE), dokumentasi API inti dengan contoh request/response, alur otentikasi & otorisasi, rekomendasi arsitektur infra & deployment, serta wireframe deskriptif untuk halaman utama, seller, admin, dan flow checkout.

Selanjutnya: jika Anda oke, saya bisa:
- Meng-generate diagram ERD PNG/SVG dan mockup Figma (atau file gambar) — atau
- Membuat scaffold kode (mono‑repo) berdasarkan spesifikasi ini.

Beritahu pilihan Anda (generate diagram/figma, atau langsung scaffold repo), atau saya lanjutkan dengan membuat repo scaffold.

--- Spesifikasi Teknis Lengkap (MVP)

1) Fitur inti (MVP)
- Autentikasi & otorisasi: signup/login (buyer, seller, admin), email verification, password reset.
- Seller onboarding & store profile (nama, deskripsi, alamat, dokumen verifikasi optional).
- Produk: CRUD produk + gambar, kategori, variasi (size/color), SKU, stock.
- Katalog & pencarian: kategori, filter (harga, rating), sort, pagination, basic relevance.
- Keranjang & checkout: cart per user, multiple items, voucher placeholder, shipping calc stub.
- Order lifecycle: pending → paid → packing → shipped → delivered → completed → cancelled/refunded.
- Pembayaran: integrasi gateway via webhook; support provider_ref & status mapping.
- Shipping: simpan alamat, input nomor resi, status shipment, manual courier selection.
- Notifikasi: email (transaksional), in-app notifications.
- Review & rating: buyer dapat menilai produk setelah delivery.
- Dashboard seller & admin: lihat order, produk, laporan dasar.
- Logging & monitoring dasar.

2) Arsitektur & komponennya
- Frontend: Next.js + React + TypeScript; server-side rendering (SEO) untuk product pages.
- Backend: NestJS + TypeScript (REST JSON API) atau tRPC if preferred; use Prisma ORM.
- DB: PostgreSQL (ACID transactional for orders).
- Cache & queue: Redis (sessions, rate limit, BullMQ for background jobs like email/payouts).
- Object storage: S3 (AWS/GCP/MinIO) untuk gambar.
- Search: Meilisearch (lightweight) atau Elasticsearch.
- CI/CD: GitHub Actions → build/test → container registry → deploy (Kubernetes/Render/Heroku/EC2).
- Observability: Sentry + Prometheus + Grafana + structured logs (JSON) to ELK/CloudWatch.
- Secrets & config: Vault or cloud secrets manager.

3) Data model (ERD summary) — entitas utama dan relasi
- users (1) —< shops (1..1 owner)
- shops (1) —< products (n)
- products (1) —< product_variants (n)
- products — categories (m:1)
- users (buyer) —< orders (n)
- orders (1) —< order_items (n) —> product_variants
- orders (1) — payments (1)
- orders (1) — shipments (1)
- products —< reviews (n) — users
- carts per user (cart_items link to product_variants)

ERD: saya sertakan juga SQL CREATE TABLE (Prisma schema bisa saya buat jika mau). Berikut SQL schema ringkas.

```sql name=schema.sql
-- Core tables (Postgres)
CREATE TABLE users (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  email TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,
  password_hash TEXT,
  name TEXT,
  phone TEXT,
  role TEXT NOT NULL, -- 'buyer' | 'seller' | 'admin'
  is_email_verified BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now()
);

CREATE TABLE shops (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  owner_user_id UUID REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  name TEXT NOT NULL,
  slug TEXT UNIQUE,
  description TEXT,
  status TEXT DEFAULT 'pending', -- pending|active|disabled
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now()
);

CREATE TABLE categories (
  id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
  name TEXT NOT NULL,
  slug TEXT UNIQUE,
  parent_id INT REFERENCES categories(id)
);

CREATE TABLE products (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  shop_id UUID REFERENCES shops(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  category_id INT REFERENCES categories(id),
  title TEXT NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now()
);

CREATE TABLE product_variants (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  product_id UUID REFERENCES products(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  sku TEXT UNIQUE,
  attributes JSONB, -- e.g. {"color":"red","size":"L"}
  price_cents BIGINT NOT NULL,
  stock INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  images TEXT[], -- S3 keys or URLs
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now()
);

CREATE TABLE carts (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  user_id UUID UNIQUE REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now()
);

CREATE TABLE cart_items (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  cart_id UUID REFERENCES carts(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  product_variant_id UUID REFERENCES product_variants(id),
  quantity INTEGER NOT NULL,
  added_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now()
);

CREATE TABLE orders (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  buyer_id UUID REFERENCES users(id),
  shop_id UUID REFERENCES shops(id),
  total_amount_cents BIGINT NOT NULL,
  currency TEXT DEFAULT 'IDR',
  status TEXT DEFAULT 'pending', -- pending|paid|packing|shipped|delivered|completed|cancelled|refunded
  shipping_address JSONB,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now()
);

CREATE TABLE order_items (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  order_id UUID REFERENCES orders(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  product_variant_id UUID REFERENCES product_variants(id),
  quantity INTEGER NOT NULL,
  unit_price_cents BIGINT NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE payments (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  order_id UUID REFERENCES orders(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  provider TEXT, -- xendit/midtrans/stripe
  provider_ref TEXT,
  status TEXT, -- pending|paid|failed
  amount_cents BIGINT,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now()
);

CREATE TABLE shipments (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  order_id UUID REFERENCES orders(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  courier TEXT,
  tracking_no TEXT,
  status TEXT DEFAULT 'pending', -- pending|in_transit|delivered
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now()
);

CREATE TABLE reviews (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  product_id UUID REFERENCES products(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  user_id UUID REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
  rating SMALLINT NOT NULL CHECK (rating >=1 AND rating <=5),
  comment TEXT,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now()
);
```

4) API Dokumentasi Inti (REST) — endpoint, auth, contoh

Authentication
- POST /api/auth/signup
  - body: { name, email, password, role } role ∈ {buyer, seller}
  - response: 201 { id, email, name, role }
- POST /api/auth/login
  - body: { email, password }
  - response: 200 { accessToken, refreshToken, user: {id,name,email,role} }
- POST /api/auth/refresh
  - body: { refreshToken }
  - response: 200 { accessToken, refreshToken }

Contoh response login:
```json name=login-response.json
{
  "accessToken": "eyJhbGciOi..",
  "refreshToken": "eyJhbGc..",
  "user": { "id": "uuid", "name": "Budi", "email": "budi@example.com", "role": "buyer" }
}
```

Products & Catalog
- GET /api/products
  - query: q, category, min_price, max_price, sort, page, per_page
  - response: { items: [...], meta: { page, per_page, total } }
- GET /api/products/:productId
  - response includes product info + variants + seller minimal info
- POST /api/shops/:shopId/products (seller only)
  - body: product payload with variants, images (images uploaded separately to S3 upload endpoint)
- PUT /api/products/:productId (seller/admin)
- DELETE /api/products/:productId (seller/admin)

Cart & Checkout
- GET /api/cart (auth required) => returns cart items
- POST /api/cart/items
  - body: { product_variant_id, quantity }
- PATCH /api/cart/items/:id
- DELETE /api/cart/items/:id
- POST /api/checkout
  - body: { cart_id, shipping_address, payment_method, coupon_code? }
  - response: { order_id, payment: { provider, payment_url? } } — payment_url if using hosted checkout
- POST /api/payments/webhook
  - provider sends status updates here; verify signature; update payments & orders.

Orders
- GET /api/orders (auth) => buyer orders or seller orders (filter by role)
- GET /api/orders/:id
- PATCH /api/orders/:id/status (seller/admin) => allowed transitions validation
  - body: { status, reason? }
- POST /api/orders/:id/ship (seller) => body: { courier, tracking_no }

Seller & Admin
- POST /api/shops (seller onboarding)
- GET /api/shops/:id/dashboard => stats (orders, revenue), paginated recent orders
- Admin endpoints: user management, shop verification, reports (protected by admin role)

Reviews
- POST /api/products/:productId/reviews (buyer only)
  - body: { rating, comment }
- GET /api/products/:productId/reviews

Search & Media
- POST /api/uploads (auth) => returns signed S3 URL or direct upload URL
- GET /api/search?q=... => proxy to Meilisearch

Security & Auth notes
- Access token: JWT, short TTL (e.g., 15–60 min)
- Refresh token: stored in DB or Redis with revoke support
- Protect write endpoints with role checks (RBAC)
- Rate limit: global & per IP (e.g., 100 req/min) using Redis
- Webhook signatures verification (X‑Signature header)

5) Flow pembayaran & webhook (contoh)
- User klik bayar → backend membuat Order (status=pending) → create payment intent with provider → provider returns payment_url (redirect) or client completes with token.
- Provider calls /api/payments/webhook with provider_ref & status; backend verifies signature then:
  - mark payment record
  - if paid: set order.status = 'paid' and enqueue notification job to seller & buyer

Webhook example body (Xendit/Midtrans style):
```json name=webhook-example.json
{
  "order_id": "uuid",
  "provider_ref": "pay_123456",
  "status": "PAID",
  "amount": 150000
}
```

6) Validasi status order & invariants
- Prevent double payment processing using DB transactions & unique provider_ref constraint.
- When order paid: decrement stock in product_variants transactionally; if stock insufficient → refund or mark backordered (policy).
- All inventory changes must be ACID within a transaction that also writes order + order_items.

7) Background jobs
- Email sending (verification, order confirmation)
- Payment reconciliation
- Payout scheduling to sellers (batch job)
- Stock sync & search indexing
Use BullMQ + Redis.

8) Testing strategy
- Unit tests (Jest) for services/logic
- Integration tests with test DB (Postgres test container)
- E2E tests (Playwright) for critical flows: signup, add product, purchase, webhook processing
- Contract tests for payment provider webhooks

9) Deployment & infra (basic)
- Containerize backend & frontend (Docker)
- Use managed Postgres (AWS RDS / DigitalOcean DB)
- Redis managed (Elasticache / DigitalOcean)
- S3-compatible (AWS S3 / DigitalOcean Spaces)
- Deploy with Kubernetes (EKS/GKE) or simpler: Render / Fly / DigitalOcean App Platform
- Add GitHub Actions pipeline: tests → build → push image → deploy

10) Observability & ops
- Errors: Sentry
- Metrics: Prometheus + Grafana
- Logs: structured JSON to CloudWatch / Elastic
- Backups: daily DB snapshots, test restoration monthly

11) Wireframes (deskripsi & komponen utama)
Saya buat wireframe deskriptif — jika mau, saya bisa ekspor ke Figma.

A. Landing / Home
- Header: search bar (prominent), kategori dropdown, cart icon (badge), user menu
- Hero: promo carousel
- Product grid: image, title, price, rating, seller name, add-to-cart button
- Footer: links, help, policies

B. Product Detail Page
- Breadcrumb
- Gallery image (left), basic info (right): title, price, stock, variations, add to cart, seller badge
- Tabs: Description | Reviews | Shipping
- Related products carousel

C. Cart & Checkout
- Cart page: list items, qty controls, subtotal, shipping estimator, coupon input, proceed to checkout
- Checkout page: shipping address form, shipping option list (courier placeholder), payment method selection, order summary, place order button.

D. Seller Dashboard
- Overview KPIs (orders today, revenue, products)
- Tabs: Orders (list with statuses), Products (list + add product), Payouts
- Product editor: title, description, images upload, variants, stock, price

E. Admin Panel
- Users & shops management, order oversight, disputes
- Approve/deny seller verification

Wireframe notes: keep mobile-first responsive. Checkout simplified single-page for MVP.

12) Non‑functional requirements
- Performance: P95 API < 300ms for product listing; heavy queries cached.
- Scalability: stateless backend; scale with replicas behind load balancer; background workers in separate pool.
- Security: store tokens securely, use HTTPS, helmet, CSRF protection on cookie approach.

13) Roadmap & Milestones (estimasi pengembangan)
- Week 0–1: Finalize spec, DB schema, infra plan, wireframes.
- Week 2–4: Core backend (auth, products, cart) + frontend basic pages.
- Week 5–8: Checkout, payments stub & webhook, order lifecycle, seller dashboard.
- Week 9–12: Admin, reviews, search, testing, deploy to staging.
(Estimasi tim kecil 2 backend, 1 frontend, 1 devops over 3 months).

14) Ops checklist pre‑production
- Env: separate staging & production
- Secrets & API keys in secret manager
- DB migration scripts (use Prisma or migrations)
- Load test & security audit
- PCI compliance: use hosted payments, do not store card data

Lampiran: contoh format API lebih rinci (endpoints utama)
- GET /api/products
- GET /api/products/:id
- POST /api/shops
- POST /api/shops/:shopId/products
- POST /api/cart/items
- POST /api/checkout
- POST /api/payments/webhook
- GET /api/orders
- PATCH /api/orders/:id/status
- POST /api/orders/:id/ship
- POST /api/products/:id/reviews

(Detail lengkap per endpoint: params, validation rules, responses, contoh error codes bisa saya keluarkan ke file OpenAPI/Swagger jika Anda mau.)

Penutup & pilihan berikutnya
- Saya bisa export dokumentasi API ke OpenAPI (YAML/JSON) + generate Postman collection.
- Saya bisa generate ERD PNG/SVG atau upload ke Figma.
- Saya bisa langsung buatkan scaffold kode (pilihan B dari sebelumnya) berdasarkan spesifikasi ini.

Silakan pilih satu:
1) Minta OpenAPI + Postman collection + ERD PNG (saya buat sekarang), atau
2) Langsung scaffold kode (repo GitHub) dengan backend + frontend skeleton, atau
3) Minta diagram/figma wireframes sebelum kode.

Jawab singkat (mis. "1" atau "2 ke audrisyahroni180-dot/marketplace-mvp"). Setelah Anda pilih, saya akan langsung membuat artefak yang dipilih.

Selesai — saya sudah membuat artefak yang Anda minta: OpenAPI spec (openapi.yaml), Postman collection (postman_collection.json), dan ERD (Graphviz DOT) plus SQL schema. Di bawah ini saya sertakan ketiga file tersebut beserta instruksi singkat cara memakai / mengonversi ERD ke PNG dan mengimpor OpenAPI ke Postman/Swagger UI. Berikut apa yang sudah saya kerjakan dan selanjutnya yang bisa saya lakukan: - Apa yang saya buat: OpenAPI (core endpoints MVP), Postman collection dengan contoh request untuk alur utama (signup → login → lihat produk → tambahkan cart → checkout stub), ERD dalam format DOT (Graphviz) dan SQL schema untuk DB. - Selanjutnya saya bisa: generate ERD PNG/SVG (jika Anda minta saya bisa buatkan file PNG), ekspor OpenAPI ke file YAML/JSON di repo GitHub, atau langsung membuat scaffold kode berdasarkan spec ini. Gunakan file-file di bawah. Untuk mengonversi ERD DOT menjadi PNG: dot -Tpng erd.dot -o erd.png (butuh Graphviz terinstall). Untuk membuka OpenAPI: gunakan Swagger Editor / Redoc / Swagger UI or import ke Postman. ---- File: openapi.yaml ---- ```yaml name=openapi.yaml openapi: 3.0.3 info: title: Marketplace MVP API version: "1.0.0" description: Core REST API for marketplace MVP (auth, products, cart, checkout stub, orders, payments webhook) servers: - url: https://api.example.com description: Production - url: http://localhost:4000 description: Local components: securitySchemes: bearerAuth: type: http scheme: bearer bearerFormat: JWT schemas: Error: type: object properties: message: type: string User: type: object properties: id: type: string format: uuid name: type: string email: type: string role: type: string enum: [buyer, seller, admin] created_at: type: string format: date-time AuthResponse: type: object properties: accessToken: type: string refreshToken: type: string user: $ref: '#/components/schemas/User' Shop: type: object properties: id: type: string format: uuid owner_user_id: type: string name: type: string slug: type: string description: type: string status: type: string Category: type: object properties: id: type: integer name: type: string slug: type: string Product: type: object properties: id: type: string format: uuid shop_id: type: string category_id: type: integer title: type: string description: type: string is_active: type: boolean variants: type: array items: $ref: '#/components/schemas/ProductVariant' ProductVariant: type: object properties: id: type: string sku: type: string attributes: type: object additionalProperties: type: string price_cents: type: integer stock: type: integer images: type: array items: type: string Cart: type: object properties: id: type: string user_id: type: string updated_at: type: string CartItem: type: object properties: id: type: string cart_id: type: string product_variant_id: type: string quantity: type: integer Order: type: object properties: id: type: string buyer_id: type: string shop_id: type: string total_amount_cents: type: integer currency: type: string status: type: string shipping_address: type: object OrderItem: type: object properties: id: type: string order_id: type: string product_variant_id: type: string quantity: type: integer unit_price_cents: type: integer PaymentWebhook: type: object properties: order_id: type: string provider_ref: type: string status: type: string amount: type: integer paths: /api/auth/signup: post: summary: Create user (buyer or seller) requestBody: required: true content: application/json: schema: type: object properties: name: { type: string } email: { type: string } password: { type: string } role: type: string enum: [buyer, seller] responses: "201": description: Created content: application/json: schema: $ref: '#/components/schemas/User' "400": description: Bad request content: application/json: schema: $ref: '#/components/schemas/Error' /api/auth/login: post: summary: Login requestBody: required: true content: application/json: schema: type: object properties: email: { type: string } password: { type: string } responses: "200": description: Auth response content: application/json: schema: $ref: '#/components/schemas/AuthResponse' "401": description: Unauthorized /api/auth/refresh: post: summary: Refresh tokens requestBody: required: true content: application/json: schema: type: object properties: refreshToken: { type: string } responses: "200": description: New tokens content: application/json: schema: $ref: '#/components/schemas/AuthResponse' /api/products: get: summary: List products parameters: - in: query name: q schema: type: string - in: query name: category schema: type: integer - in: query name: min_price schema: type: integer - in: query name: max_price schema: type: integer - in: query name: page schema: type: integer - in: query name: per_page schema: type: integer responses: "200": description: Products list content: application/json: schema: type: object properties: items: type: array items: $ref: '#/components/schemas/Product' meta: type: object /api/products/{productId}: get: summary: Get product detail parameters: - in: path name: productId required: true schema: type: string responses: "200": description: Product content: application/json: schema: $ref: '#/components/schemas/Product' "404": description: Not found /api/shops: post: summary: Create shop (seller onboard) security: - bearerAuth: [] requestBody: required: true content: application/json: schema: type: object properties: name: { type: string } description: { type: string } responses: "201": description: Shop created content: application/json: schema: $ref: '#/components/schemas/Shop' /api/shops/{shopId}/products: post: summary: Create product (seller) security: - bearerAuth: [] parameters: - in: path name: shopId required: true schema: type: string requestBody: required: true content: application/json: schema: type: object properties: title: { type: string } description: { type: string } category_id: { type: integer } variants: type: array items: $ref: '#/components/schemas/ProductVariant' responses: "201": description: Product created content: application/json: schema: $ref: '#/components/schemas/Product' /api/cart: get: summary: Get cart (auth) security: - bearerAuth: [] responses: "200": description: Cart content: application/json: schema: $ref: '#/components/schemas/Cart' /api/cart/items: post: summary: Add item to cart security: - bearerAuth: [] requestBody: required: true content: application/json: schema: type: object properties: product_variant_id: { type: string } quantity: { type: integer } responses: "201": description: Added content: application/json: schema: $ref: '#/components/schemas/CartItem' /api/checkout: post: summary: Create order from cart (checkout stub) security: - bearerAuth: [] requestBody: required: true content: application/json: schema: type: object properties: cart_id: { type: string } shipping_address: { type: object } payment_method: { type: string } responses: "200": description: Order created (with payment info) content: application/json: schema: type: object properties: order_id: type: string payment: type: object properties: provider: { type: string } payment_url: { type: string } /api/payments/webhook: post: summary: Payment provider webhook requestBody: required: true content: application/json: schema: $ref: '#/components/schemas/PaymentWebhook' responses: "200": description: OK /api/orders: get: summary: List orders (buyer or seller) security: - bearerAuth: [] responses: "200": description: Orders /api/orders/{orderId}: get: summary: Get order security: - bearerAuth: [] parameters: - in: path name: orderId required: true schema: type: string responses: "200": description: Order detail /api/orders/{orderId}/status: patch: summary: Update order status (seller/admin) security: - bearerAuth: [] parameters: - in: path name: orderId required: true schema: type: string requestBody: required: true content: application/json: schema: type: object properties: status: { type: string } reason: { type: string } responses: "200": description: Updated /api/orders/{orderId}/ship: post: summary: Mark shipped (seller) security: - bearerAuth: [] parameters: - in: path name: orderId required: true schema: type: string requestBody: required: true content: application/json: schema: type: object properties: courier: { type: string } tracking_no: { type: string } responses: "200": description: Shipment recorded /api/products/{productId}/reviews: post: summary: Post review (buyer) security: - bearerAuth: [] parameters: - in: path name: productId required: true schema: type: string requestBody: required: true content: application/json: schema: type: object properties: rating: { type: integer, minimum: 1, maximum: 5 } comment: { type: string } responses: "201": description: Review created /api/uploads: post: summary: Create signed upload URL (auth) security: - bearerAuth: [] requestBody: required: true content: application/json: schema: type: object properties: filename: { type: string } content_type: { type: string } responses: "200": description: Signed URL content: application/json: schema: type: object properties: upload_url: { type: string } key: { type: string } security: - {} ``` ---- File: postman_collection.json ---- ```json name=postman_collection.json { "info": { "name": "Marketplace MVP API - Example", "schema": "https://schema.getpostman.com/json/collection/v2.1.0/collection.json", "version": "1.0.0" }, "variable": [ { "key": "baseUrl", "value": "http://localhost:4000" }, { "key": "accessToken", "value": "" } ], "item": [ { "name": "Auth / Signup", "request": { "method": "POST", "header": [{ "key": "Content-Type", "value": "application/json" }], "body": { "mode": "raw", "raw": "{\n \"name\": \"Budi\",\n \"email\": \"budi@example.com\",\n \"password\": \"P@ssw0rd\",\n \"role\": \"buyer\"\n}" }, "url": { "raw": "{{baseUrl}}/api/auth/signup", "host": ["{{baseUrl}}"], "path": ["api","auth","signup"] } }, "response": [] }, { "name": "Auth / Login", "request": { "method": "POST", "header": [{ "key": "Content-Type", "value": "application/json" }], "body": { "mode": "raw", "raw": "{\n \"email\": \"budi@example.com\",\n \"password\": \"P@ssw0rd\"\n}" }, "url": { "raw": "{{baseUrl}}/api/auth/login", "host": ["{{baseUrl}}"], "path": ["api","auth","login"] } } }, { "name": "GET /api/products", "request": { "method": "GET", "header": [], "url": { "raw": "{{baseUrl}}/api/products", "host": ["{{baseUrl}}"], "path": ["api","products"] } } }, { "name": "POST /api/cart/items", "request": { "method": "POST", "header": [ { "key": "Content-Type", "value": "application/json" }, { "key": "Authorization", "value": "Bearer {{accessToken}}" } ], "body": { "mode": "raw", "raw": "{\n \"product_variant_id\": \"\",\n \"quantity\": 1\n}" }, "url": { "raw": "{{baseUrl}}/api/cart/items", "host": ["{{baseUrl}}"], "path": ["api","cart","items"] } } }, { "name": "POST /api/checkout", "request": { "method": "POST", "header": [ { "key": "Content-Type", "value": "application/json" }, { "key": "Authorization", "value": "Bearer {{accessToken}}" } ], "body": { "mode": "raw", "raw": "{\n \"cart_id\": \"\",\n \"shipping_address\": {\"line1\":\"Jl. Contoh 1\",\"city\":\"Jakarta\"},\n \"payment_method\": \"xendit\"\n}" }, "url": { "raw": "{{baseUrl}}/api/checkout", "host": ["{{baseUrl}}"], "path": ["api","checkout"] } } }, { "name": "Webhook (example)", "request": { "method": "POST", "header": [{ "key": "Content-Type", "value": "application/json" }], "body": { "mode": "raw", "raw": "{\n \"order_id\": \"\",\n \"provider_ref\": \"pay_123\",\n \"status\": \"PAID\",\n \"amount\": 150000\n}" }, "url": { "raw": "{{baseUrl}}/api/payments/webhook", "host": ["{{baseUrl}}"], "path": ["api","payments","webhook"] } } } ] } ``` ---- File: erd.dot ---- ```dot name=erd.dot digraph ERD { rankdir=LR; node [shape=plaintext,fontname="Helvetica"]; users [label=<
users
id (PK)uuid
emailtext
password_hashtext
nametext
roletext
>]; shops [label=<
shops
id (PK)uuid
owner_user_id (FK)uuid
nametext
statustext
>]; categories [label=<
categories
id (PK)int
nametext
>]; products [label=<
products
id (PK)uuid
shop_id (FK)uuid
category_id (FK)int
titletext
>]; product_variants [label=<
product_variants
id (PK)uuid
product_id (FK)uuid
skutext
price_centsbigint
stockint
>]; carts [label=<
carts
id (PK)uuid
user_id (FK)uuid
>]; cart_items [label=<
cart_items
id (PK)uuid
cart_id (FK)uuid
product_variant_id (FK)uuid
quantityint
>]; orders [label=<
orders
id (PK)uuid
buyer_id (FK)uuid
shop_id (FK)uuid
total_amount_centsbigint
statustext
>]; order_items [label=<
order_items
id (PK)uuid
order_id (FK)uuid
product_variant_id (FK)uuid
quantityint
>]; payments [label=<
payments
id (PK)uuid
order_id (FK)uuid
providertext
statustext
>]; shipments [label=<
shipments
id (PK)uuid
order_id (FK)uuid
couriertext
tracking_notext
>]; reviews [label=<
reviews
id (PK)uuid
product_id (FK)uuid
user_id (FK)uuid
ratingsmallint
>]; users -> shops [label="owner_user_id"]; shops -> products [label="shop_id"]; categories -> products [label="category_id"]; products -> product_variants [label="product_id"]; product_variants -> cart_items [label="product_variant_id"]; carts -> cart_items [label="cart_id"]; users -> carts [label="user_id"]; users -> orders [label="buyer_id"]; shops -> orders [label="shop_id"]; orders -> order_items [label="order_id"]; product_variants -> order_items [label="product_variant_id"]; orders -> payments [label="order_id"]; orders -> shipments [label="order_id"]; products -> reviews [label="product_id"]; users -> reviews [label="user_id"]; } ``` ---- File: schema.sql ---- ```sql name=schema.sql -- Core tables (Postgres) CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS pgcrypto; CREATE TABLE users ( id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(), email TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL, password_hash TEXT, name TEXT, phone TEXT, role TEXT NOT NULL, -- 'buyer' | 'seller' | 'admin' is_email_verified BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now(), updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now() ); CREATE TABLE shops ( id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(), owner_user_id UUID REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE, name TEXT NOT NULL, slug TEXT UNIQUE, description TEXT, status TEXT DEFAULT 'pending', -- pending|active|disabled created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now() ); CREATE TABLE categories ( id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, slug TEXT UNIQUE, parent_id INT REFERENCES categories(id) ); CREATE TABLE products ( id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(), shop_id UUID REFERENCES shops(id) ON DELETE CASCADE, category_id INT REFERENCES categories(id), title TEXT NOT NULL, description TEXT, is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now() ); CREATE TABLE product_variants ( id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(), product_id UUID REFERENCES products(id) ON DELETE CASCADE, sku TEXT UNIQUE, attributes JSONB, price_cents BIGINT NOT NULL, stock INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, images TEXT[], created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now() ); CREATE TABLE carts ( id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(), user_id UUID UNIQUE REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE, updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now() ); CREATE TABLE cart_items ( id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(), cart_id UUID REFERENCES carts(id) ON DELETE CASCADE, product_variant_id UUID REFERENCES product_variants(id), quantity INTEGER NOT NULL, added_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now() ); CREATE TABLE orders ( id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(), buyer_id UUID REFERENCES users(id), shop_id UUID REFERENCES shops(id), total_amount_cents BIGINT NOT NULL, currency TEXT DEFAULT 'IDR', status TEXT DEFAULT 'pending', shipping_address JSONB, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now(), updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now() ); CREATE TABLE order_items ( id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(), order_id UUID REFERENCES orders(id) ON DELETE CASCADE, product_variant_id UUID REFERENCES product_variants(id), quantity INTEGER NOT NULL, unit_price_cents BIGINT NOT NULL ); CREATE TABLE payments ( id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(), order_id UUID REFERENCES orders(id) ON DELETE CASCADE, provider TEXT, provider_ref TEXT UNIQUE, status TEXT, amount_cents BIGINT, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now() ); CREATE TABLE shipments ( id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(), order_id UUID REFERENCES orders(id) ON DELETE CASCADE, courier TEXT, tracking_no TEXT, status TEXT DEFAULT 'pending', created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now() ); CREATE TABLE reviews ( id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(), product_id UUID REFERENCES products(id) ON DELETE CASCADE, user_id UUID REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE SET NULL, rating SMALLINT NOT NULL CHECK (rating >=1 AND rating <=5), comment TEXT, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now() ); ``` Instruksi cepat (cara memakai artefak) - OpenAPI: - Simpan openapi.yaml lalu buka di https://editor.swagger.io atau gunakan Redocly / Swagger UI untuk dokumentasi interaktif. - Dari OpenAPI Anda dapat generate server stub (OpenAPI Generator) atau client SDK. - Postman: - Import postman_collection.json ke Postman; set environment variable baseUrl ke http://localhost:4000; gunakan login response to set accessToken. - ERD: - Simpan erd.dot dan jalankan: dot -Tpng erd.dot -o erd.png (butuh Graphviz). - Alternatif: paste DOT ke online Graphviz renderer. Mau saya: - Konversi DOT → PNG dan kirim file PNG sekarang? (Saya bisa buatkan file dan upload ke repo jika Anda beri repo atau saya dapat menyematkan data PNG base64 di chat.) - Generate OpenAPI JSON (sudah simple) dan buatkan file ready-to-commit ke GitHub repo (sebutkan owner/repo). - Generate Postman collection exported link / shareable gist. Pilih satu tindakan selanjutnya singkat (mis. "Buat PNG", "Commit ke repo audrisyahroni180-dot/marketplace-mvp", atau "export OpenAPI ke JSON").

Baik — mau saya lanjut ke langkah mana? Pilih satu dari opsi di bawah (jawab singkat), lalu saya langsung kerjakan dan jelaskan langkah berikutnya:

1) Commit ke GitHub repo — saya akan commit openapi.json, postman_collection.json, erd.dot, schema.sql. (Butuh owner/repo, mis. audrisyahroni180-dot/marketplace-mvp, dan pastikan saya boleh menulis ke repo atau Anda beri akses nanti.)

2) Generate server stub dari OpenAPI — sebutkan bahasa/stack yang Anda mau (pilihan umum: NestJS TypeScript, Express TypeScript, FastAPI Python, Go Gin). Saya akan buat stub dan file yang siap di-commit.

3) Buat ERD PNG/SVG dan kirim — sebutkan format (png/svg). (Perlu konfirmasi: saya akan menghasilkan file dan siap kirim sebagai data untuk Anda download.)

Tulis pilihan Anda (mis. "1 audrisyahroni180-dot/marketplace-mvp" atau "2 NestJS" atau "3 png").

schema.sql.name: schema.sql
schema.sql.value:
-- Core tables (Postgres)
CREATE TABLE users (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  email TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,
  password_hash TEXT,
  name TEXT,
  phone TEXT,
  role TEXT NOT NULL, -- 'buyer' | 'seller' | 'admin'
  is_email_verified BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now()
);

CREATE TABLE shops (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  owner_user_id UUID REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  name TEXT NOT NULL,
  slug TEXT UNIQUE,
  description TEXT,
  status TEXT DEFAULT 'pending', -- pending|active|disabled
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now()
);

CREATE TABLE categories (
  id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
  name TEXT NOT NULL,
  slug TEXT UNIQUE,
  parent_id INT REFERENCES categories(id)
);

CREATE TABLE products (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  shop_id UUID REFERENCES shops(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  category_id INT REFERENCES categories(id),
  title TEXT NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now()
);

CREATE TABLE product_variants (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  product_id UUID REFERENCES products(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  sku TEXT UNIQUE,
  attributes JSONB, -- e.g. {"color":"red","size":"L"}
  price_cents BIGINT NOT NULL,
  stock INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  images TEXT[], -- S3 keys or URLs
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now()
);

CREATE TABLE carts (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  user_id UUID UNIQUE REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now()
);

CREATE TABLE cart_items (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  cart_id UUID REFERENCES carts(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  product_variant_id UUID REFERENCES product_variants(id),
  quantity INTEGER NOT NULL,
  added_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now()
);

CREATE TABLE orders (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  buyer_id UUID REFERENCES users(id),
  shop_id UUID REFERENCES shops(id),
  total_amount_cents BIGINT NOT NULL,
  currency TEXT DEFAULT 'IDR',
  status TEXT DEFAULT 'pending', -- pending|paid|packing|shipped|delivered|completed|cancelled|refunded
  shipping_address JSONB,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now()
);

CREATE TABLE order_items (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  order_id UUID REFERENCES orders(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  product_variant_id UUID REFERENCES product_variants(id),
  quantity INTEGER NOT NULL,
  unit_price_cents BIGINT NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE payments (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  order_id UUID REFERENCES orders(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  provider TEXT, -- xendit/midtrans/stripe
  provider_ref TEXT,
  status TEXT, -- pending|paid|failed
  amount_cents BIGINT,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now()
);

CREATE TABLE shipments (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  order_id UUID REFERENCES orders(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  courier TEXT,
  tracking_no TEXT,
  status TEXT DEFAULT 'pending', -- pending|in_transit|delivered
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now()
);

CREATE TABLE reviews (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  product_id UUID REFERENCES products(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  user_id UUID REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
  rating SMALLINT NOT NULL CHECK (rating >=1 AND rating <=5),
  comment TEXT,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now()
);

schema.sql.name: schema.sql
schema.sql.value:
-- Core tables (Postgres)
CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS pgcrypto;

CREATE TABLE users (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  email TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,
  password_hash TEXT,
  name TEXT,
  phone TEXT,
  role TEXT NOT NULL, -- 'buyer' | 'seller' | 'admin'
  is_email_verified BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now()
);

CREATE TABLE shops (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  owner_user_id UUID REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  name TEXT NOT NULL,
  slug TEXT UNIQUE,
  description TEXT,
  status TEXT DEFAULT 'pending', -- pending|active|disabled
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now()
);

CREATE TABLE categories (
  id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
  name TEXT NOT NULL,
  slug TEXT UNIQUE,
  parent_id INT REFERENCES categories(id)
);

CREATE TABLE products (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  shop_id UUID REFERENCES shops(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  category_id INT REFERENCES categories(id),
  title TEXT NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now()
);

CREATE TABLE product_variants (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  product_id UUID REFERENCES products(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  sku TEXT UNIQUE,
  attributes JSONB,
  price_cents BIGINT NOT NULL,
  stock INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  images TEXT[],
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now()
);

CREATE TABLE carts (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  user_id UUID UNIQUE REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now()
);

CREATE TABLE cart_items (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  cart_id UUID REFERENCES carts(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  product_variant_id UUID REFERENCES product_variants(id),
  quantity INTEGER NOT NULL,
  added_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now()
);

CREATE TABLE orders (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  buyer_id UUID REFERENCES users(id),
  shop_id UUID REFERENCES shops(id),
  total_amount_cents BIGINT NOT NULL,
  currency TEXT DEFAULT 'IDR',
  status TEXT DEFAULT 'pending',
  shipping_address JSONB,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now()
);

CREATE TABLE order_items (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  order_id UUID REFERENCES orders(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  product_variant_id UUID REFERENCES product_variants(id),
  quantity INTEGER NOT NULL,
  unit_price_cents BIGINT NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE payments (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  order_id UUID REFERENCES orders(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  provider TEXT,
  provider_ref TEXT UNIQUE,
  status TEXT,
  amount_cents BIGINT,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now()
);

CREATE TABLE shipments (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  order_id UUID REFERENCES orders(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  courier TEXT,
  tracking_no TEXT,
  status TEXT DEFAULT 'pending',
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now()
);

CREATE TABLE reviews (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  product_id UUID REFERENCES products(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  user_id UUID REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
  rating SMALLINT NOT NULL CHECK (rating >=1 AND rating <=5),
  comment TEXT,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now()
);

openapi.yaml.name: openapi.yaml
openapi.yaml.value:
openapi: 3.0.3
info:
  title: Marketplace MVP API
  version: "1.0.0"
  description: Core REST API for marketplace MVP (auth, products, cart, checkout stub, orders, payments webhook)
servers:
  - url: https://api.example.com
    description: Production
  - url: http://localhost:4000
    description: Local
components:
  securitySchemes:
    bearerAuth:
      type: http
      scheme: bearer
      bearerFormat: JWT
  schemas:
    Error:
      type: object
      properties:
        message:
          type: string
    User:
      type: object
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
          format: uuid
        name:
          type: string
        email:
          type: string
        role:
          type: string
          enum: [buyer, seller, admin]
        created_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time
    AuthResponse:
      type: object
      properties:
        accessToken:
          type: string
        refreshToken:
          type: string
        user:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/User'
    Shop:
      type: object
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
          format: uuid
        owner_user_id:
          type: string
        name:
          type: string
        slug:
          type: string
        description:
          type: string
        status:
          type: string
    Category:
      type: object
      properties:
        id:
          type: integer
        name:
          type: string
        slug:
          type: string
    Product:
      type: object
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
          format: uuid
        shop_id:
          type: string
        category_id:
          type: integer
        title:
          type: string
        description:
          type: string
        is_active:
          type: boolean
        variants:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/ProductVariant'
    ProductVariant:
      type: object
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
        sku:
          type: string
        attributes:
          type: object
          additionalProperties:
            type: string
        price_cents:
          type: integer
        stock:
          type: integer
        images:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string
    Cart:
      type: object
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
        user_id:
          type: string
        updated_at:
          type: string
    CartItem:
      type: object
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
        cart_id:
          type: string
        product_variant_id:
          type: string
        quantity:
          type: integer
    Order:
      type: object
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
        buyer_id:
          type: string
        shop_id:
          type: string
        total_amount_cents:
          type: integer
        currency:
          type: string
        status:
          type: string
        shipping_address:
          type: object
    OrderItem:
      type: object
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
        order_id:
          type: string
        product_variant_id:
          type: string
        quantity:
          type: integer
        unit_price_cents:
          type: integer
    PaymentWebhook:
      type: object
      properties:
        order_id:
          type: string
        provider_ref:
          type: string
        status:
          type: string
        amount:
          type: integer
paths:
  /api/auth/signup:
    post:
      summary: Create user (buyer or seller)
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              properties:
                name: { type: string }
                email: { type: string }
                password: { type: string }
                role:
                  type: string
                  enum: [buyer, seller]
      responses:
        "201":
          description: Created
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/User'
        "400":
          description: Bad request
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/Error'
  /api/auth/login:
    post:
      summary: Login
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              properties:
                email: { type: string }
                password: { type: string }
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Auth response
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/AuthResponse'
        "401":
          description: Unauthorized
  /api/auth/refresh:
    post:
      summary: Refresh tokens
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              properties:
                refreshToken: { type: string }
      responses:
        "200":
          description: New tokens
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/AuthResponse'
  /api/products:
    get:
      summary: List products
      parameters:
        - in: query
          name: q
          schema:
            type: string
        - in: query
          name: category
          schema:
            type: integer
        - in: query
          name: min_price
          schema:
            type: integer
        - in: query
          name: max_price
          schema:
            type: integer
        - in: query
          name: page
          schema:
            type: integer
        - in: query
          name: per_page
          schema:
            type: integer
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Products list
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  items:
                    type: array
                    items:
                      $ref: '#/components/schemas/Product'
                  meta:
                    type: object
  /api/products/{productId}:
    get:
      summary: Get product detail
      parameters:
        - in: path
          name: productId
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Product
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/Product'
        "404":
          description: Not found
  /api/shops:
    post:
      summary: Create shop (seller onboard)
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              properties:
                name: { type: string }
                description: { type: string }
      responses:
        "201":
          description: Shop created
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/Shop'
  /api/shops/{shopId}/products:
    post:
      summary: Create product (seller)
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - in: path
          name: shopId
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              properties:
                title: { type: string }
                description: { type: string }
                category_id: { type: integer }
                variants:
                  type: array
                  items:
                    $ref: '#/components/schemas/ProductVariant'
      responses:
        "201":
          description: Product created
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/Product'
  /api/cart:
    get:
      summary: Get cart (auth)
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Cart
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/Cart'
  /api/cart/items:
    post:
      summary: Add item to cart
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              properties:
                product_variant_id: { type: string }
                quantity: { type: integer }
      responses:
        "201":
          description: Added
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/CartItem'
  /api/checkout:
    post:
      summary: Create order from cart (checkout stub)
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              properties:
                cart_id: { type: string }
                shipping_address: { type: object }
                payment_method: { type: string }
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Order created (with payment info)
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  order_id:
                    type: string
                  payment:
                    type: object
                    properties:
                      provider: { type: string }
                      payment_url: { type: string }
  /api/payments/webhook:
    post:
      summary: Payment provider webhook
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/PaymentWebhook'
      responses:
        "200":
          description: OK
  /api/orders:
    get:
      summary: List orders (buyer or seller)
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Orders
  /api/orders/{orderId}:
    get:
      summary: Get order
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - in: path
          name: orderId
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Order detail
  /api/orders/{orderId}/status:
    patch:
      summary: Update order status (seller/admin)
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - in: path
          name: orderId
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              properties:
                status: { type: string }
                reason: { type: string }
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Updated
  /api/orders/{orderId}/ship:
    post:
      summary: Mark shipped (seller)
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - in: path
          name: orderId
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              properties:
                courier: { type: string }
                tracking_no: { type: string }
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Shipment recorded
  /api/products/{productId}/reviews:
    post:
      summary: Post review (buyer)
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - in: path
          name: productId
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              properties:
                rating: { type: integer, minimum: 1, maximum: 5 }
                comment: { type: string }
      responses:
        "201":
          description: Review created
  /api/uploads:
    post:
      summary: Create signed upload URL (auth)
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              properties:
                filename: { type: string }
                content_type: { type: string }
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Signed URL
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  upload_url: { type: string }
                  key: { type: string }
security:
  - {}

postman_collection.json.name: postman_collection.json

>]; users -> shops [label="owner_user_id"]; shops -> products [label="shop_id"]; categories -> products [label="category_id"]; products -> product_variants [label="product_id"]; product_variants -> cart_items [label="product_variant_id"]; carts -> cart_items [label="cart_id"]; users -> carts [label="user_id"]; users -> orders [label="buyer_id"]; shops -> orders [label="shop_id"]; orders -> order_items [label="order_id"]; product_variants -> order_items [label="product_variant_id"]; orders -> payments [label="order_id"]; orders -> shipments [label="order_id"]; products -> reviews [label="product_id"]; users -> reviews [label="user_id"]; }

openapi.json.name: openapi.json
